texto: If there was one thing Sam understood, it was guilt. It didn't have to be logical; oftentimes it wasn't. Itsawed at your gut relentlessly, tediously, until you wore it like a scar.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Debra Cowan: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “If there was one thing Sam understood, it was guilt. It didn't have to be logical; oftentimes it …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, guilt, there pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
